languages.text: Древние обелиски черного камня исписаны какими-то ксеносскими глифами.
The ancient obelisks of black stone are inscribed with some kind of xenos glyphs.
languages.original_text: Древние обелиски черного камня исписаны какими-то ксеносскими глифами.

traits.locale_text: The ancient obelisks of black stone are inscribed with some kind of xenos glyphs.

languages.text: 古代の黒石の柱には、何らかの異星文字が刻まれている。
languages.original_text: The ancient obelisks of black stone are inscribed with some kind of xenos glyphs.

traits.locale_text: 古代の黒石の柱には、何らかの異星文字が刻まれている。

languages.text: Kara taştan yapılmış kadim dikili taşların üzerine bir tür zeno glifleri kazınmış.
languages.original_text: The ancient obelisks of black stone are inscribed with some kind of xenos glyphs.

traits.locale_text: Kara taştan yapılmış kadim dikili taşların üzerine bir tür zeno glifleri kazınmış.

languages.text: Los antiguos obeliscos de piedra negra están inscritos con algún tipo de jeroglíficos alienígenas.
languages.original_text: The ancient obelisks of black stone are inscribed with some kind of xenos glyphs.

languages.text: 古老的黑色石质方尖碑上，铭刻着某种异形象形符号。

languages.text: Les anciens obélisques de pierre noire portent à leur surface des glyphes xénos dont la nature demeure incertaine.

languages.text: Die alten Obelisken aus schwarzem Stein sind mit Xenosglyphen beschrieben.
